text.en: Hummingbirds are among the most remarkable creatures in the natural world. These tiny aviators can hover in mid-air, fly backwards, and their hearts can beat up to 1,260 times per minute during flight. Despite their small size, they play a crucial role in pollination and maintain delicate ecological balances in various ecosystems.
